 # RGE Handoff Document
 
+> **Snapshot**: 2026-06-08 (ISSUE-349 editor-shell extension-command executor seam): task 102 is implemented as an editor-shell seam only. `EditorShell::route_menu_command` captures `Command::Custom` / `Command::Plugin` activations before draining them to an injected `ExtensionCommandHandler` when configured. Missing handlers are non-fatal and observable through the retained FIFO plus seam events; handled, unhandled, and failed handler outcomes are recorded without invoking document handlers or blocking later extension commands. Core commands such as Save and Toggle Command Palette stay on the existing shell routes and are not delivered to the seam. No real plugin runtime, discovery, loading, WASM, capabilities, async executor, sandbox, host FIFO replacement, generalized registry execution, Cargo, workflow, scheduler, or dispatch automation work is wired.
+
 > **Snapshot**: 2026-06-08 (ISSUE-347 Phase 9 task-102 selection): task 101's source-read audit selected task 102: add a bounded editor-shell extension-command executor seam for already-captured `Command::Custom` / `Command::Plugin` activations. Evidence: `EditorShell::route_menu_command` is the current route-menu owner, extension activations already reach an editor-shell FIFO and one-shot drain, and `crates/editor-shell` / `editor/rge-editor` have no current `PluginHost` / `PluginContext` / runtime/discovery/loading path. The next task should define the execution seam and policy with injected-handler tests, not wire real plugins. Keep plugin runtime/discovery/loading, Cargo, host FIFO replacement, generalized registry execution, keybinding editor, CAD mutation, clipboard, workflows, scheduler, and dispatch automation out of scope.

+# Execution Report
+
+DISPATCH_ID: ISSUE-349
+AUTHOR: Executor / Codex
+TIMESTAMP: 2026-06-08_22-30-40+0300
+RELATED_FILES:
+- crates/editor-shell/src/lifecycle/mod.rs - registered the extension-command module and added optional handler/event state to EditorShell constructors.
+- crates/editor-shell/src/lifecycle/extension_command.rs - added the editor-shell-owned injected handler seam, result/error/event types, and captured-command processing.
+- crates/editor-shell/src/render_path.rs - routed captured Custom/Plugin commands through the new shell capture/handler method while leaving core routes unchanged.
+- crates/editor-shell/src/lifecycle/tests.rs - added synthetic-handler coverage for FIFO delivery, no-handler observability, unhandled/failure continuation, and core-command non-delivery.
+- plans/BASELINE.md - recorded the task-102 seam as shipped and preserved non-goals.
+- Status.md - added the ISSUE-349 status snapshot.
+- HANDOFF.md - added the ISSUE-349 handoff snapshot.
+- change.md - appended the ISSUE-349 change entry.
+- .ai/dispatch.tasks.md - marked task 102 done.
+STATUS: AWAITING_REVIEW
+
+## Task Packet Reference
+
+`ai_handoffs/ISSUE-349_TASK_2026-06-08_21-58-52+0300.md`
+

+No pre-execution review issued for this dispatch.
+

+  Re-run: `git grep -n -E "impl EditorShell|impl EditorState|route_menu_command" -- crates/editor-shell/src/render_path.rs` -> exit 0, showed `impl EditorShell` at `crates/editor-shell/src/render_path.rs:204`, the route-menu definition at `crates/editor-shell/src/render_path.rs:415`, and no `impl EditorState` match.
+
+- Claim: Extension commands were captured in editor-shell state and now remain shell-owned through the injected seam.
+  Re-run: `git grep -n -E "drain_extension_menu_commands|extension_menu_commands|future plugin/action executor|extension menu command captured" -- crates/editor-shell/src/lifecycle/mod.rs crates/editor-shell/src/render_path.rs crates/editor-shell/src/lifecycle/tests.rs` -> exit 0, showed the retained FIFO field/initializers in `lifecycle/mod.rs`, the one-shot drain in `render_path.rs`, and tests using the FIFO. The old "future plugin/action executor" and old capture-log strings no longer match because the seam is now implemented.
+
+- Claim: Editor-shell still has no plugin runtime, discovery, or loading path wired by this task.
+  Re-run: `git grep -n -E "PluginHost|PluginContext|runtime-wasmtime|plugin-discovery|rge_kernel_plugin_host|rge-runtime" -- crates/editor-shell editor/rge-editor` -> exit 1, no matches.
+
+- Claim: The stale route-menu owner wording did not recur in docs or task bookkeeping.
+  Re-run: `git grep -n "EditorState::route_menu_command" -- .ai/dispatch.tasks.md plans/BASELINE.md Status.md HANDOFF.md change.md` -> exit 1, no matches.
+
+- Claim: No forbidden source/Cargo/workflow/plugin-runtime surface was edited.
+  Re-run: `git diff --name-only` -> exit 0, tracked edits were confined to `.ai/dispatch.tasks.md`, `HANDOFF.md`, `Status.md`, `change.md`, `crates/editor-shell/src/lifecycle/mod.rs`, `crates/editor-shell/src/lifecycle/tests.rs`, `crates/editor-shell/src/render_path.rs`, and `plans/BASELINE.md`; the only new Rust source file is `crates/editor-shell/src/lifecycle/extension_command.rs`.
+
+## What I Changed
+
+### Source
+
+- `crates/editor-shell/src/lifecycle/extension_command.rs`: added `ExtensionCommandHandler`, `ExtensionCommandOutcome`, `ExtensionCommandError`, `ExtensionCommandEvent`, `with_extension_command_handler`, `drain_extension_command_events`, `process_captured_extension_menu_commands`, and the internal capture helper.
+- `crates/editor-shell/src/lifecycle/mod.rs`: exposed the lifecycle module types and added `extension_command_handler` plus `extension_command_events` fields initialized in all shell constructors.
+- `crates/editor-shell/src/render_path.rs`: changed the `Command::Custom` / `Command::Plugin` arm to call the shell capture helper; core command arms are unchanged.
+
+### Tests
+
+- `crates/editor-shell/src/lifecycle/tests.rs::menu_extension_commands_without_handler_remain_observable_fifo`: proves no-handler activations remain FIFO-drainable and record missing-handler events.
+- `crates/editor-shell/src/lifecycle/tests.rs::menu_extension_commands_are_delivered_to_configured_handler_fifo`: proves a configured synthetic handler receives Plugin then Custom in FIFO order and drains the captured FIFO.
+- `crates/editor-shell/src/lifecycle/tests.rs::menu_core_commands_are_not_delivered_to_extension_handler`: proves Save and Toggle Command Palette keep their existing behavior and are not delivered to the extension handler.
+- `crates/editor-shell/src/lifecycle/tests.rs::menu_extension_handler_failure_and_unhandled_are_nonfatal`: proves handler failure and unhandled outcomes are recorded, do not run document handlers, and do not block later extension commands.

+# Task Packet
+
+DISPATCH_ID: ISSUE-349
+AUTHOR: Planner / OpenAI Codex
+TIMESTAMP: 2026-06-08_21-58-52+0300
+RELATED_FILES:
+- crates/editor-shell/src/lifecycle/mod.rs
+- crates/editor-shell/src/lifecycle/extension_command.rs
+- crates/editor-shell/src/render_path.rs
+- crates/editor-shell/src/lifecycle/tests.rs
+- plans/BASELINE.md
+- Status.md

+- change.md
+- .ai/dispatch.tasks.md
+STATUS: OPEN
+
+## Goal
+
+Add the smallest editor-shell-owned extension-command executor seam beyond the
+existing captured extension command FIFO. `Command::Custom` and
+`Command::Plugin` menu activations already reach
+`EditorShell::route_menu_command` and are captured in editor-shell state; this
+dispatch must add an injectable shell seam that can process those captured
+extension commands without wiring real plugin runtime, discovery, loading, WASM,
+capability, async, or sandbox infrastructure.
+
+## Scope
+
+### MAY edit
+- `crates/editor-shell/src/lifecycle/mod.rs`
+- `crates/editor-shell/src/lifecycle/extension_command.rs` (optional helper module)

+- `crates/editor-shell/src/lifecycle/tests.rs`

+
+## Deliverables
+
+- An editor-shell-owned extension-command executor seam with an injectable
+  handler used only for captured `Command::Custom` and `Command::Plugin`
+  activations.
+- FIFO processing from the existing extension command capture path into the
+  injected handler, without delivering representative core commands to that
+  handler.
+- Explicit, observable, non-fatal behavior for missing handlers, handler
+  failures, and unhandled extension commands.
+- Focused editor-shell tests using a synthetic handler for FIFO delivery,
+  core-command non-delivery, no-handler behavior, and failure/unhandled
+  behavior.
+- Status/task bookkeeping that records this dispatch as an editor-shell seam
+  only, with no real plugin runtime, discovery, or loading wired.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+
+- A configured synthetic handler receives `Command::Plugin` and
+  `Command::Custom` activations in FIFO order after menu routing.
+- Core commands, including representative commands such as Save and Toggle
+  Command Palette, are not delivered to the extension executor seam and keep
+  their existing document/menu behavior.
+- No-handler behavior is covered and keeps captured extension activations
+  observable rather than silently dropping them.
+- Handler failure or unhandled results are non-fatal, do not invoke document
+  handlers, and do not prevent later extension commands from being processed.
+- The seam accepts only extension commands captured by
+  `EditorShell::route_menu_command`; it does not introduce generalized registry
+  execution or host-to-shell FIFO replacement.
+- No plugin host, plugin discovery, plugin loading, WASM runtime, capability
+  manifest, async executor, sandbox integration, Cargo metadata, workflow, or
+  architecture-lint change is introduced.
+
+## Current-State Claims: Falsification Required
+
+Every negative or unchanged assertion the executor relies on must include the
+inverse search/read command and observed result in the `EXECUTION_REPORT`.
+
+- Claim: The current public route-menu command handler is
+  `EditorShell::route_menu_command`.
+  Falsifying searches:
+  - `git grep -n "pub fn route_menu_command" -- crates/editor-* editor/` ->
+    exactly one definition:
+    `crates/editor-shell/src/render_path.rs:415:    pub fn route_menu_command(&mut self, command: Command) {`.
+  - `git grep -n -E "impl EditorShell|impl EditorState|route_menu_command" -- crates/editor-shell/src/render_path.rs`
+    -> current source shows `impl EditorShell` at
+    `crates/editor-shell/src/render_path.rs:204`, the route-menu definition at
+    `crates/editor-shell/src/render_path.rs:415`, and no `impl EditorState`
+    match in that file.
+- Claim: Extension commands are currently captured in editor-shell state but do
+  not have a shell-owned executor seam.
+  Falsifying search:
+  - `git grep -n -E "drain_extension_menu_commands|extension_menu_commands|future plugin/action executor|extension menu command captured" -- crates/editor-shell/src/lifecycle/mod.rs crates/editor-shell/src/render_path.rs crates/editor-shell/src/lifecycle/tests.rs`
+    -> current matches are the FIFO field and initializers in
+    `crates/editor-shell/src/lifecycle/mod.rs`, the one-shot drain and capture
+    log in `crates/editor-shell/src/render_path.rs`, and retention/drain tests
+    in `crates/editor-shell/src/lifecycle/tests.rs`.
+- Claim: Editor-shell currently has no plugin runtime, discovery, or loading
+  path to wire safely in this task.
+  Falsifying search:
+  - `git grep -n -E "PluginHost|PluginContext|runtime-wasmtime|plugin-discovery|rge_kernel_plugin_host|rge-runtime" -- crates/editor-shell editor/rge-editor`
+    -> no matches; exit 1 is the expected no-match result.
+- Claim: The previous failed route-menu owner defect must not recur in docs or
+  task bookkeeping.
+  Falsifying search before and after edits:
+  - `git grep -n "EditorState::route_menu_command" -- .ai/dispatch.tasks.md plans/BASELINE.md Status.md HANDOFF.md change.md`
+    -> no matches; exit 1 is the expected no-match result.
+
+## Constraints / Non-Goals
+
+- Do not implement real plugin runtime, plugin discovery, plugin loading, WASM
+  execution, manifest capability checks, async execution, or sandboxing.
+- Do not edit editor UI command definitions, editor-egui-host menu
+  projection/registration behavior, host-to-shell FIFO semantics, plugin/runtime
+  crates, kernel plugin-host code, Cargo metadata, workflows, dispatch
+  automation, schemas, or architecture lints.
+- Do not solve generalized command registry execution, keybinding editor
+  behavior, conflict fatality policy, OS clipboard, typed clipboard, CAD
+  graph/projection mutation, deletion/duplication, undo integration, dirty-state
+  quit prompts, or broader camera UI.
+- Do not deliver core commands to the extension executor seam. Core commands
+  remain routed by the existing editor-shell menu/document paths.
+- Do not name the stale route-menu owner in final docs or task bookkeeping;
+  use `EditorShell::route_menu_command` or an unambiguous editor-shell
+  `route_menu_command` reference.
+
+## Verification Gates
+
+The executor MUST run and document the result of each of these in the
+`EXECUTION_REPORT`:
+
+- Focused editor-shell tests covering extension-command executor FIFO,
+  no-handler behavior, unhandled/failure behavior, and core-command
+  non-delivery -> expected exit 0.
+- `cargo +nightly fmt --all -- --check` -> expected exit 0.
+- `cargo test -p rge-editor-shell --lib` -> expected exit 0.
+- `cargo check -p rge-editor-shell --lib` -> expected exit 0.
+- `git diff --check` -> expected exit 0.
+- `git grep -n "pub fn route_menu_command" -- crates/editor-* editor/` ->
+  expected exactly one definition in `crates/editor-shell/src/render_path.rs`.
+- `git grep -n -E "PluginHost|PluginContext|runtime-wasmtime|plugin-discovery|rge_kernel_plugin_host|rge-runtime" -- crates/editor-shell editor/rge-editor`
+  -> expected no matches; exit 1 is the expected no-match result.
+- `git grep -n "EditorState::route_menu_command" -- .ai/dispatch.tasks.md plans/BASELINE.md Status.md HANDOFF.md change.md`
+  -> expected no matches; exit 1 is the expected no-match result.
+
+## Halt Conditions
+
+The executor MUST halt without committing and request fresh guidance if any of
+the following occur:
+
+- The implementation requires editing outside the MAY edit surface or adding
+  files outside the MAY add surface.
+- The implementation requires changes to editor-ui, editor-egui-host,
+  plugin/runtime crates, kernel plugin-host, Cargo metadata, workflows, dispatch
+  automation, schemas, architecture lints, or any forbidden generated artifact.
+- Current source no longer supports the premise that
+  `EditorShell::route_menu_command` is the route-menu owner.
+- A core command would have to be delivered to the extension executor seam to
+  make the design work.
+- Missing-handler, failure, or unhandled behavior cannot be made both
+  non-fatal and observable within editor-shell.
+- Verification failures cannot be resolved within the allowed scope.
+- Final docs or task bookkeeping would need to mention the stale route-menu
+  owner instead of `EditorShell::route_menu_command`.
+
+## Planner Notes
+
+Task 102 in `.ai/dispatch.tasks.md` is the source of truth for this dispatch.
+The prior ISSUE-347 selection audit chose plugin/extension command execution
+policy beyond command capture as the next bounded Phase 9/editor-usability
+follow-up. This packet intentionally scopes the work to an editor-shell seam and
+synthetic tests; it does not authorize plugin runtime integration or UI/host
+surface changes.

+### 2026-06-08 - Editor-shell extension-command executor seam
+
+**Forward-only follow-up (ISSUE-349 / task 102).** Narrows the gap after
+extension menu command capture without wiring a real plugin stack.
+`EditorShell::route_menu_command` remains the menu-route owner: core commands
+stay on the existing shell/document paths, while `Command::Custom` and
+`Command::Plugin` activations are captured first and then drained to an
+injected `ExtensionCommandHandler` when one is configured.
+
+**Now shipped - injectable shell seam only.**
+- `lifecycle::extension_command` defines the handler trait, handled/unhandled
+  result, non-fatal error type, and observable seam events.
+- `EditorShell` owns an optional handler plus event FIFO; missing-handler
+  activations remain observable through the retained extension-command FIFO
+  and explicit missing-handler events.
+- Handler `Unhandled` and failure results are non-fatal, recorded as events,
+  and do not prevent later extension commands from being delivered.
+- Shell tests use a synthetic handler to prove FIFO delivery, missing-handler
+  observability, failure/unhandled continuation, and core-command
+  non-delivery for representative Save and Toggle Command Palette routes.
+
+**Still open - explicitly NOT closed here:** real plugin runtime, plugin
+discovery, plugin loading, WASM execution, capability manifests, async
+execution, sandbox integration, plugin registration UX beyond existing menu
+entries, host-to-shell FIFO replacement, generalized registry execution,
+keybinding editor behavior, CAD mutation, clipboard behavior, Cargo,
+workflows, scheduler, architecture-lint, or dispatch automation behavior.
+
+**Scope:** `editor-shell` lifecycle/render-path routing state and tests plus
+top-level status/task bookkeeping; no `editor-ui`, no `editor-egui-host`, no
+plugin/runtime/kernel-plugin-host crates, no Cargo/workflow/scheduler/
+automation behavior.
+
 ### 2026-06-08 - Phase 9 editor-usability task-102 selection audit
 
 **Source-read selection result (ISSUE-347).** Current source supports one
